card.name: Feeding Time
card.text: Destroy all nonland permanents. Create a 1/1 black Insect creature token for each permanent you controlled that was destroyed this way.

card.name: Luminous Wings, Nesttender
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control with flying. Flying, vigilance, lifelink Whenever Luminous Wings enters or attacks, return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If that card has mana value 3 or less, return it to the battlefield instead.

card.name: Basking Gargantua, Drifter
card.text: This spell can't be countered Whenever Basking Gargantua or another creature you control enters, target player mills cards equal to that creature's toughness. {1}{U}, Discard a card: Exile Basking Gargantua. Return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Brood Parasite
card.text: You may have this creature enters under the control of an opponent of your choice. Flying When this creature enters, sacrifice another creature. If you can't, sacrifice this creature.

card.name: Sanguine Hunger, Bloodspiller
card.text: Trample, lifelink As long as you have at least 10 life more than your starting life total, you may cast creature spells from your graveyard by paying life equal to their mana value instead of paying their mana cost.

card.name: Sun Mane, Pridemaster
card.text: First strike, haste Ward—Pay 7 life Whenever Sun Mane attacks, exile cards from the top of defending player's library until you exile a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield tapped and attacking that player. At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice that creature.

card.name: Creeping Ivydian
card.text: Collective {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Exile this card from your hand: Target attacking creature you control gains the following abilities until end of turn. You can cast this spell later from exile.) This creature gets +1/+0 for each land you control. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Fecund Colony Mother
Immense Tusks, Herdcaller
card.text: Trample, ward {2} Whenever you cast a creature spell from anywhere other than your hand, you may search your library for a creature card with lesser mana value, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Grist, the Endless Hunger
card.text: Flying, trample, haste Whenever Grist or another Insect you control enter or dies, an Insect card is put into your graveyard from anywhere other than the battlefield, or an Insect card leaves your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Trace of Martial Wisdom
card.text: When this enchantment enters or leaves the battle, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature you control. {5}{U}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Target creature you control gains flying and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw that many cards" until end of turn.

card.name: Trace of Forbidden Knowledge
card.text: When this enchantment enters or leaves the battlefield, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) {4}{B}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Target player mills X cards, where X is the number of cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Mortician Beetle
card.text: Whenever a player sacrifices a creature, you may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Trace of Living Death
card.text: When this enchantment enters or leaves the battlefield, return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. {3}{G}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Add {B}{B}{B}{G}{G}{G}. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells or activate abilities of creature sources.

card.name: Impulsive Jackrabbit
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Symbiotic — Whenever this creature and a creature with greater power attack together, exile the top card of your library. Until the beginning of combat on your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Manaquill Porcupine
card.text: Reach Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Hungry Wingclaw
card.text: During your turn, this creature has flying. Whenever you activate a collective ability and whenever another creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Jagged Ridge Boar
card.text: Collective {2}{R} ({2}{R}, Exile this card from your hand: Target attacking creature you control gains the following abilities until end of turn. You can cast this spell later from exile.) Double strike, trample

card.name: Trace of Unerring Force
card.text: When this enchantment enters or leaves the battlefield, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. {2}{W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Each creature you control with first strike gains double strike until end of turn, then each other creature you control gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Taunting Baboon
card.text: Collective {3}{G} ({3}{G}, Exile this card from your hand: Target attacking creature you control gains the following abilities until end of turn. You can cast this spell later from exile.) All creatures able to block this creature do so.

card.name: Trace of Endless Growth
card.text: When this enchantment enters or leaves the battlefield, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {4}{R}, Sacrifice this enchantment: This enchantment deals damage equal to the number of lands you control to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Valley Maker Wurm
card.text: Trample Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. They gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Igneous Omen
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Invigorating Winds
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you draw a card and gain 2 life. {2}{WU}: Target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Deadbog Gator
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice one or more nontoken permanents, create a 1/1 black and green Zombie Frog creature token with "This token can't block."

card.name: Scavengers' Feast
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. You draw two cards and gain 3 life. Flashback {3}{B}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Hunter Duo
card.text: Flying, menace Whenever you attacking causes one or more triggered abilities you control to trigger, copy up to one target triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Pack Attack
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, it deals damage equal to the number of creatures you control to target creature you don't control. If that creature is blocking, each creature it's blocking gains trample until end of turn. {2}{RW}: Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Devour the Soul
card.text: Choose one— • Destroy target creature. • Destroy target enchantment. • Counter target spell. You lose 3 life and mill three cards.

card.name: Opportunistic Scavengers
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature enters or attacks, draw a card, then discard a card unless you exile two cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Wildfire Tusker
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy up to one target land. That land's controller may search their library for a basic land, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Skyskimmer Drake
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control two or more creatures with flying. Flying, vigilance

card.name: Fungal Roach
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, mill two cards. When this creature dies, you may exile it. When you do, return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Crackling Jerboa
card.text: Symbiotic — Whenever this creature and a creature with greater power attack together, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Whenever this creature is dealt damage while it's attacking, it deals that much damage to defending player.

card.name: Shadow-Eye Raven
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest in your graveyard.

card.name: Wrong Step
card.text: Kicker—Tap an untapped creature you control with power 4 or greater (You may tap an untapped creature you control with power 4 or greater in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Choose target creature. Return it to its owner's hand. If this spell was kicked, instead that creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Sink Into Tar
card.text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Cloud Dancer Gryff
card.text: Collective {WU} ({WU}, Exile this card from your hand: Target attacking creature you control gains the following ability until end of turn. You can cast this spell later from exile.) Flying

card.name: Survey the Terrain
card.text: Search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Scurrying Glittermouse
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. Symbiotic — Whenever this creature and a creature with greater power attack together, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Feref Boughs Widow
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, you draw a card and gain 2 life.

card.name: Coordinated Lioness
card.text: This creature can't attack or block alone.

card.name: Inkcloud Drifter
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Geoderoller Scarab
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Twisting Eye Peacock
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. If you controlled that creature, create a 1/1 white and blue Bird creature token with flying.

card.name: Hypnotic Octopus
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Exhaust — {4}{U}{U}: For each opponent, gain control of up to one nonland permanent that player controls with mana value equal to or less than this creature's power. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)
